name: Old Dominion Freight Line
analysis: Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at $216.4955. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry $216.4955, stop $213.4704, target $221.3494. Risk/reward is 1.60:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
